name: Refried Beans
recipeIngredient: Water, to cover beans and rinse until clear
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse soaked pinto beans in cold water until the water runs clear.
2. Cover beans with fresh water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for approximately 3 hours or until tender.
3. In a large skillet, sauté garlic and onions over medium heat until fragrant. Add bay leaves and cumin.
4. Drain cooked beans and mash with a potato masher until smooth.
5. Stir in the sautéed garlic mixture and season with salt to taste.
6. Transfer mashed beans to a baking dish and cover with foil.
7. Bake at 350°F for approximately 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
These refried beans will be authentic and flavorful without added fats.
